SITE_URL.description: Your public site origin (e.g. `https://example.com` or `https://your-worker.workers.dev`). Used at build time for canonical links, og:url, and sitemap URLs. Set to your Workers dev subdomain if you don't have a custom domain yet — you can change it later in Worker → Settings → Variables (re-deploy to regenerate the sitemap).

CONTACT_TO_EMAIL.description: Inbox that receives contact-form submissions. Any address — it doesn't need to be on your domain.

CONTACT_FROM_EMAIL.description: Sender address for contact-form emails. Must be on a domain you've verified in [Email Sending](https://dash.cloudflare.com/?to=/:account/email/email-sending) (e.g. `noreply@yourdomain.com`).

TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY.description: Turnstile secret key for server-side verification. Create at [Turnstile](https://dash.cloudflare.com/?to=/:account/turnstile). Leave empty to disable captcha.

PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY.description: Turnstile site key (rendered in HTML — safe to expose). Must pair with the secret key above.
